top_signals.title: Bennett CIO on 24 years of trucking tech transformation
top_signals.summary:
Bennett Family of Companies CIO Praveen Boppana details the shift from paper logs to ELDs and dash cams plus the three-year AI TMS roadmap with Motive.

The post Bennett CIO on 24 years of trucking tech transformation appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Elevate founder Julia Baldet: Hospitality is brutal, but I don’t regret leaving finance
top_signals.summary: Each week, we dig into the memory bank of the City’s great and good. Today, Julia Baldet, founder of City smoothie hotspot Elevate, takes us through her career.
